item.title: Issue #2708 created
item.description:
XPath, FLWOR, key/value keywords: map order

Now that maps are ordered, some sections in the XPath spec may need to be updated. For example, 4.14.1 For Expressions:

  1. When the key and/or value keywords are present: a. The value of the binding collection must be a single map. […] The map is treated as a sequence of key/value pairs, in implementation dependent order. … h. The return expression […] the position variable (if present) is bound to the one-based position of that entry in the implementation dependent ordering of the binding collection.
